sql.query: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN termKey='workflow' THEN singularLabel END),'Workflow') AS workflowSingular,COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN termKey='workflow' THEN pluralLabel END),'Workflows') AS workflowPlural,COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN termKey='stage' THEN singularLabel END),'Stage') AS stageSingular,COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN termKey='stage' THEN pluralLabel END),'Stages') AS stagePlural,COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN termKey='task' THEN singularLabel END),'Task') AS taskSingular,COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN termKey='task' THEN pluralLabel END),'Tasks') AS taskPlural FROM tbl_tenant_terminology WHERE tenantId=:tenantId
